words.def: a physiological need for food; the consequence of food deprivation
words.zh: n. 飢餓, 渴望, 饑荒

words.def: unusually great in size or amount or degree or especially extent or scope; ; ; ; ; ; ; ; ; - W.R.Inge
words.zh: a. 極大的, 巨大的, 無限的

words.def: a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely
words.zh: n. 跑, 賽跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趨向, 流出, 運轉時間, 連續
n. 訊息, 真相, 情報

words.def: a weapon that discharges a missile at high velocity (especially from a metal tube or barrel)
